languages.text: "Не был — есть". {n}Мягко, но настойчиво поправляет Эоганн.{/n} "Все, что я говорил о нем до этого — правда. Он дополняет меня в том, что я не могу развить в себе сам. Он также мой самый ярый оппонент — его скепсис и осторожность всегда уравновешивали мой научный оптимизм и дерзость. Мы редко полностью согласны друг с другом, но я верю, что без наших столкновений мы бы оба куда меньше постигли и сделали. Мы — симбиоз, целое, более могучее, чем его части по отдельности".

"Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."
languages.original_text: "Не был — есть". {n}Мягко, но настойчиво поправляет Эоганн.{/n} "Все, что я говорил о нем до этого — правда. Он дополняет меня в том, что я не могу развить в себе сам. Он также мой самый ярый оппонент — его скепсис и осторожность всегда уравновешивали мой научный оптимизм и дерзость. Мы редко полностью согласны друг с другом, но я верю, что без наших столкновений мы бы оба куда меньше постигли и сделали. Мы — симбиоз, целое, более могучее, чем его части по отдельности".

"Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. languages.text: «Era no, es». {n}Eogunn te corrige de forma humilde pero enérgica.{/n} «Todo lo que he dicho sobre él es cierto. Me complementa en todo lo que no pudo desarrollar en mí mismo. También es mi mayor oponente. Su escepticismo y cautela son el equilibrio perfecto para mi optimismo científico y mi osadía. Casi nunca estamos completamente de acuerdo, pero estoy convencido de que sin nuestros conflictos no habríamos descubierto tanto ni llegado tan lejos. Nuestra relación es simbiótica, juntos formamos un todo superior a la suma de sus partes».
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."

traits.locale_text: «Era no, es». {n}Eogunn te corrige de forma humilde pero enérgica.{/n} «Todo lo que he dicho sobre él es cierto. Me complementa en todo lo que no pudo desarrollar en mí mismo. También es mi mayor oponente. Su escepticismo y cautela son el equilibrio perfecto para mi optimismo científico y mi osadía. Casi nunca estamos completamente de acuerdo, pero estoy convencido de que sin nuestros conflictos no habríamos descubierto tanto ni llegado tan lejos. Nuestra relación es simbiótica, juntos formamos un todo superior a la suma de sus partes».

languages.text: “什么叫‘以前’？他现在也是。”{n}伊奥贡温和却坚定地纠正道。{/n}“我说过关于他的话句句属实。他弥补了我自己无力改变的一切缺失。他也是我最坚定的反对者——他的怀疑与谨慎，总是能完美制衡我在科学上的盲目乐观和胆大妄为。我们很少能就任何事完全达成一致，但我相信，没有彼此间的冲突，我们各自的发现和成就都会少许多。这是一种共生关系——我们的结合，构成了一个比单纯的个体相加更强大的整体。”
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."

traits.locale_text: “什么叫‘以前’？他现在也是。”{n}伊奥贡温和却坚定地纠正道。{/n}“我说过关于他的话句句属实。他弥补了我自己无力改变的一切缺失。他也是我最坚定的反对者——他的怀疑与谨慎，总是能完美制衡我在科学上的盲目乐观和胆大妄为。我们很少能就任何事完全达成一致，但我相信，没有彼此间的冲突，我们各自的发现和成就都会少许多。这是一种共生关系——我们的结合，构成了一个比单纯的个体相加更强大的整体。”

languages.text: « Comment il est, {n}corrige Eogunn sur un ton à la fois aimable et catégorique.{/n} Tout ce que je vous ai déjà dit à son sujet est vrai. Il me complète dans tous les domaines qui me font défaut. C'est aussi mon plus fervent adversaire : son scepticisme et sa prudence ont toujours compensé mon optimisme et mon audace scientifiques. Il est rare que nous soyons totalement d'accord, quel que soit le sujet, mais je pense que sans nos conflits, nous n'en aurions jamais découvert et accompli autant. Notre relation est symbiotique : ensemble, nous formons un tout qui est plus puissant que ses composantes individuelles. »
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."

Notre relation est symbiotique : ensemble, nous formons un tout qui est plus puissant que ses composantes individuelles. »

languages.text: "Biriydi mi? O hâlâ aramızda." {n}Eogunn, hafif ama vurgulu bir şekilde seni düzeltiyor.{/n} "Onun hakkında daha önce söylediğim her şey doğru. Kendi içimde besleyemediğim her şeyde beni tamamlıyor. Aynı zamanda benim en sadık muhalifim... Şüpheciliği ve tedbiri, benim bilimsel iyimserliğimi ve cüretkârlığımı daima dengelemiştir. Nadiren herhangi bir konuda tamamen hemfikir oluruz ama inanıyorum ki çatışmalarımız olmasaydı ikimiz de çok daha az şey keşfeder ve başarırdık. Bizimki ortakyaşar bir ilişki. Birlikte, bireysel parçalarından daha güçlü bir bütün oluşturuyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."

Kendi içimde besleyemediğim her şeyde beni tamamlıyor. Aynı zamanda benim en sadık muhalifim... Şüpheciliği ve tedbiri, benim bilimsel iyimserliğimi ve cüretkârlığımı daima dengelemiştir. Nadiren herhangi bir konuda tamamen hemfikir oluruz ama inanıyorum ki çatışmalarımız olmasaydı ikimiz de çok daha az şey keşfeder ve başarırdık. Bizimki ortakyaşar bir ilişki. Birlikte, bireysel parçalarından daha güçlü bir bütün oluşturuyoruz."

languages.text: "Nicht war — ist", {n}korrigiert dich Eogunn sanft, aber bestimmt.{/n} "Alles, was ich über ihn sagte, stimmt. Er ergänzt mich um alles, was ich selbst nicht in mir nähren kann. Und er ist mein standhaftester Gegner ... seine Skepsis und Vorsicht haben meinen wissenschaftlichen Optimismus und Wagemut stets im Gleichgewicht gehalten. Wir sind uns nur selten einig, aber ich glaube, ohne unsere Konflikte hätten wir beide weit weniger entdeckt und erreicht. Wir bilden eine Symbiose ... gemeinsam sind wir ein Ganzes, das stärker ist als seine Teile."
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."

languages.text: 「『だった』ではない――『である』だ」{n}と、エオガンは穏やかに、しかし力強く訂正した。{/n}「以前、彼について語ったことはすべて真実だ。彼は、私自身では育みえないものすべてを補ってくれる。同時に彼は、私の最も頑強な好敵手でもある――その懐疑と慎重さは、私の科学的楽観と大胆さを常に均衡させてきた。完全に意見が一致することなどめったにないが、衝突がなければ、我々二人の発見も達成もはるかに乏しかっただろうと信じている。我々の関係は共生だ――共にあって、個々の総和を超える、より強力な全体を成すのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Not was — is," {n}comes Eogunn's mild yet emphatic correction.{/n} "Everything I said about him before is true. He complements me in all that I cannot foster in myself. He is also my staunchest opponent — his scepticism and caution have always balanced my scientific optimism and audacity. We rarely completely agree on anything, but I believe that without our conflicts, we both would have discovered and achieved far less. Ours is a symbiotic relationship — together we form a whole that is more powerful than its individual parts."
